input.prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.
Create a summary of the project architecture and save it as a text file in my Downloads/shinobu directory.

subtasks.title: Locate project architecture files
subtasks.description: Identify and access the relevant files or documentation that describe the project architecture (e.g., README, design docs, source code comments).

subtasks.title: Read and extract architecture details
subtasks.description: Review the identified files to understand the structure, components, dependencies, and key design decisions of the project.

subtasks.title: Summarize project architecture
subtasks.description: Condense the extracted information into a clear, concise summary covering major architectural elements and their relationships.

subtasks.title: Create text file in ~/Downloads/shinobu/
subtasks.description: Generate a new text file at the specified path ~/Downloads/shinobu/ to store the architecture summary.

subtasks.title: Write summary to file
subtasks.description: Save the generated architecture summary into the newly created text file.
